name: Drag selection survives mouse in line gap (multi-line wrapped text)
description: Regression: when dragging across multi-line wrapped text, the selection used to collapse whenever the mouse_x crossed the anchor x (e.g. when passing through the inter-line gap directly below the anchor). Root cause: the MOUSE_MOVE drag handler always used text->rect (the FIRST TextRect of the wrapped text node) and ignored mouse_y, so for any mouse position the focus_offset was computed within line 1. The fix walks the TextRect chain and picks the rect whose vertical band best matches mouse_y.

events.message: Mouse down on text 'Alpha' (line 1 of p1)
Drag to text on a later line ('mike')
Drag into the GAP between lines (column near anchor x)
Drag onto text on yet a later line ('quebec')
